+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "seaweedfs-7649-question-recommended-way-to-back-up-seaweedfs-cluster-data-exclud",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "seaweedfs: Question: Recommended way to back up SeaweedFS cluster data (excluding some paths) for disaster recovery?",
+    "description": "Question: Recommended way to back up SeaweedFS cluster data (excluding some paths) for disaster recovery?. Community-requested feature.",
+    "type": "feature",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Check current seaweedfs deployment",
+        "description": "Verify your seaweedfs version and configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n seaweedfs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=seaweedfs\nhelm list -n seaweedfs 2>/dev/null || echo \"Not installed via Helm\"\n```\nThis feature requires a working seaweedfs installation."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review seaweedfs configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant seaweedfs configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get all -n seaweedfs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=seaweedfs\nkubectl get configmap -n seaweedfs -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=seaweedfs\n```\nHi, I would like to find the *official and recommended* method for backing up a SeaweedFS cluster for disaster recovery (DR), especially when I need to **exclude specific paths** from the backup."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for Question: Recommended way to back up SeaweedFS cluster data…",
+        "description": "Added a background task that periodically syncs file metadata for open files to the filer, ensuring chunk references are visible to `volume.fsck` even before files are closed.\n```yaml\n-metadataSyncSec (default: 120)\n  Periodically sync file metadata to filer in seconds.\n  Set to 0 to disable.\n```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Verify the feature works",
+        "description": "Test that the new capability is working as expected:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n seaweedfs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=seaweedfs\nkubectl get events -n seaweedfs --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10\n```\nConfirm the feature described in \"Question: Recommended way to back up SeaweedFS cluster data…\" is functioning correctly."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "Added a background task that periodically syncs file metadata for open files to the filer, ensuring chunk references are visible to `volume.fsck` even before files are closed.",
+      "codeSnippets": [
+        "-metadataSyncSec (default: 120)\n  Periodically sync file metadata to filer in seconds.\n  Set to 0 to disable.",
